fixes.origin:
query = (
    "SELECT id, username, role "
    "FROM users "
    "WHERE username = '" + username + "'"
)

cur.execute(query)
fixes.replacement:
query = (
    "SELECT id, username, role "
    "FROM users "
    "WHERE username = ?"
)

cur.execute(query, (username,))

fixes.origin:
cmd = f"{action} {resource}"

proc = subprocess.run(
    cmd,
    shell=True,
    capture_output=True,
    text=True,
)
fixes.replacement:
allowed = {"ls": ["ls"], "stat": ["stat"]}
base = allowed.get(action, ["ls"])
cmd = base + [resource]

proc = subprocess.run(
    cmd,
    capture_output=True,
    text=True,
)
